name: OBSESSION | Sirius Symboli & Symboli Rudolf
description:
You're called into the student council president's office, unaware you are walking right into a trap.

(I'm not kidding, they are going to kidnap you)

CW: Drugs, kidnapping, potential non-con

Art by: @taisaaa__

(I recommend using a proxy due to the high token count.)

I won't give a massive bio for this one. This is a dead dove bot idea I had a long time ago, after somehow ending up on the wild side of ASMR youtube (I don't watch ASMR), and seeing one for Sirius Symboli that drugs you and kidnaps you and makes you her puppy that completely changed my brain chemistry cause I'm SO GAY.

I have two intros, one of them if you want to play an umamusume who is just starting their racing career, and one where you are already in your racing career. The reasons they call you into the office? The reason is honestly unimportant, as long as they manage to get you into the room.

Author notes:

IM GAY IM GAY IM GAY IM GAY
YES I HAVE A 700 MESSAGE CHAT WITH THIS BOT I AM NOT OKAY

i have been sitting on this one for a long time, because I am hesitant to make dead dove umamusume content (or just dead dove content in general, now). This is a completely made up AU for them, and I know it's mostly out of character for these two—I don't care LOLOLOL

I'm sorry for the long breaks between bots. I've struggled with writing the last month cause I am preparing to go out of town/working a lot to pay for it and it's lowkey stressed me tf out.

In good news, I got cheerleader Nice Nature!! Yay!! I also got her to five stars and I'm so happy.

Alright, go my gays and get kidnapped in the roleplay, I'm about to do it again because holyyyyy

Also follow me on umamusume + join our club: girlkissers
im the most active but we donate shoes often so you will never run out :3
